{"version":"Notebook/1.0","isLocked":false,"fallbackResourceIds":["/subscriptions/d4c995f0-0cba-4d52-8272-4c568d44b677/resourceGroups/rg-dfir-lab06-test/providers/Microsoft.OperationalInsights/workspaces/law-dfir-lab06-test"],"items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# Lab 06 - Identity Detection Dashboard
This lightweight workbook is the deployable workbook used by the gated pipeline. The full analyst workbook remains under `workbooks/exports/identity_dashboard.json` as evidence."},"name":"intro"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let audit=AuditLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize Rows=count();
let signin=SigninLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize Rows=count();
let sp=AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h) | summarize Rows=count();
union (audit | extend TableName='AuditLogs'), (signin | extend TableName='SigninLogs'), (sp | extend TableName='AADServicePrincipalSignInLogs')
| project TableName, Rows","size":0,"title":"Ingestion status (24h)","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"ingestion_status"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where ResultType != 0
| summarize FailedAttempts=count(), Users=dcount(UserPrincipalName) by IPAddress
| order by FailedAttempts desc","size":0,"title":"Failed sign-in burst candidates","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"failed_signin_candidates"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where OperationName has_any ('role', 'member')
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Result, InitiatedBy, TargetResources
| order by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"Directory role change timeline","timeContext":{"durationMs":604800000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"role_change_timeline"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where OperationName has_any ('credential', 'secret', 'service principal', 'app consent')
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, Result, InitiatedBy, TargetResources
| order by TimeGenerated desc","size":0,"title":"App and service principal credential events","timeContext":{"durationMs":604800000},"queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table"},"name":"sp_credential_events"}]}
